listings.title: Cozy Vegan Studio in the East Village
listings.description: A bright and welcoming studio apartment in the heart of the East Village. Fully vegan household — no animal products on the premises. Steps away from amazing vegan restaurants and farmers markets. The building is eco-friendly with solar panels and a rooftop garden. Ideal for a vegan professional or student seeking a calm, plant-based living environment.
listings.about_lister: I'm a long-time vegan chef and herbalist who cares deeply about sustainability. I'm moving abroad for a year and want to find a responsible tenant who will respect the space.
listings.rental_requirements: No smoking, no animal products. References required. First and last month's deposit.

listings.title: Private Room in Vegan Co-living House, Silver Lake
listings.description: Join our established vegan household in the trendy Silver Lake neighborhood! We are three vegans (graphic designer, yoga instructor, software engineer) looking for a fourth housemate. The house has a beautiful kitchen with a dedicated herb garden, a meditation room, and a sunny backyard perfect for outdoor dining. Plenty of plant-based cooking happens here.
listings.about_lister: Vegan for 8 years, love hiking, cooking elaborate plant-based meals on weekends, and going to local indie markets. Looking for someone chill who appreciates communal living.
listings.rental_requirements: Vegan or transitioning to veganism preferred. Non-smoker. Open to pets that are vegan-compatible (rabbits, guinea pigs — no cats or dogs).

listings.title: Spacious Vegan-Friendly Loft in Wicker Park
listings.description: Beautiful open-plan loft in Wicker Park with exposed brick and 12-foot ceilings. The current tenants are vegan but the next occupant doesn't need to be — just respectful of our animal-free kitchen policy. Great access to the Blue Line and surrounded by incredible vegan options including Chicago Diner and Amitabul. Perfect for creatives or young professionals.
listings.about_lister: Artist and urban farmer subletting while on a 6-month residency in Berlin. Love the neighborhood and hope to find someone who will enjoy it as much as I do.
listings.rental_requirements: No cooking meat on the premises. Non-smoker. Short-term subletter welcome.

listings.title: Sunny 2BR in Brooklyn — Fully Vegan Building
listings.description: This rare gem is located in a fully vegan building in the heart of Park Slope. Two spacious bedrooms with great natural light, updated kitchen, in-unit laundry, and a private garden access. The building houses a community of vegans and has a shared rooftop greenhouse. Neighborhood is walkable with proximity to Prospect Park and the best vegan brunch spots in NYC.
listings.about_lister: Building manager for a vegan cooperative. We screen tenants for lifestyle alignment — this isn't a judgment but a community decision to maintain a 100% plant-based building.
listings.rental_requirements: Must be fully vegan. No exceptions. Background check required. Community interview process.

listings.title: Shared Room in Vegan House near UCLA
listings.description: Looking for a vegan or vegan-curious roommate to share a large bedroom in our 4-bedroom vegan house near UCLA. The house is walking distance from campus and the Expo Line. We host weekly vegan potlucks and movie nights. Kitchen is fully stocked with spices, grains, and pantry staples. Great environment for students or grad researchers.
listings.about_lister: PhD student in Environmental Science, vegan activist, and avid cyclist. Our house is warm, inclusive, and very community-oriented.
listings.rental_requirements: Must be vegan or actively transitioning. Students or young professionals preferred. No overnight guests more than 3 nights per week.

listings.title: Modern 1BR in Logan Square, Vegan-Friendly
listings.description: Modern renovated 1-bedroom in Logan Square, one of Chicago's most vibrant and vegan-friendly neighborhoods. Walking distance to Revolution Brewing, the 606 trail, and excellent vegan spots like Kale My Name and Ground-Up Sustainable Eatery. The apartment has heated floors, stainless steel kitchen, and in-building laundry. Ideal for a solo vegan professional.
listings.about_lister: I own this unit and live upstairs. I'm vegan and prefer a vegan tenant but it's not a requirement. I'm an easy-going landlord who respects tenant privacy.
listings.rental_requirements: Non-smoker. No parties. References and credit check required.

listings.title: Zen Vegan Retreat Room in Astoria, Queens
listings.description: A peaceful private room in a meticulously maintained vegan household in Astoria, Queens. The apartment features a meditation corner, a library of vegan/plant-based books, and a beautiful balcony garden with edible plants. Minutes from the N/W trains and Astoria Park. Our household practices mindful, low-waste living. Great for someone who wants a quiet, intentional home.
listings.about_lister: Yoga teacher and Reiki practitioner. Been vegan for 12 years. I keep a very calm and clean home. Looking for someone who values peace, plants, and community.
listings.rental_requirements: Must be fully vegan. No alcohol in common areas. Quiet hours after 10pm.

listings.title: Entire Vegan Bungalow in Echo Park
listings.description: Charming 2-bedroom bungalow with original hardwood floors and a lush private garden in Echo Park. The fully fenced yard has raised vegetable beds, a citrus tree, and a composting station. Perfect for a small vegan family, couple, or two friends. The neighborhood is rich with vegan culture — Echo Park Lake, Cookbook store, and LAFC stadium are nearby. Parking included.
listings.about_lister: Owner of this property since 2015. Went vegan after a health journey and converted the home to a fully plant-based space. Looking for long-term tenants who will love the garden as much as I do.
listings.rental_requirements: Fully vegan household only. Long-term lease preferred (12+ months). References and income verification required.

listings.title: Uptown Chicago Studio for Vegan Professional
listings.description: Quiet top-floor studio in Uptown, steps from the Red Line and Lake Michigan. The building has a rooftop deck with container herb gardens maintained by vegan residents. The unit has been freshly painted and has excellent soundproofing. Ideal for someone who works remotely or commutes downtown. Close to Arya Bhavan (vegan Indian) and many other plant-based options.
listings.about_lister: Retired teacher who owns several units in the building. Respectful of tenant privacy and quick to address maintenance issues. Prefer vegan or vegan-friendly tenants.
listings.rental_requirements: Non-smoker. Steady income (2.5x rent). First month + security deposit.
